processes.name: completeOrder
preconditions: Order must have at least one line
Order status must be DR (Draft) or IP (In Progress)
All order lines must have a product assigned
All order lines must have a positive quantity

steps.name: validatePreconditions
steps.description: Check that the order meets all preconditions before completing

operation.errorMessage: Order does not meet completion preconditions

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject orders missing lines, wrong status, lines without product, or zero/negative qty

steps.name: assignDocumentNumber
steps.description: Assign the next document number from the sequence to the order

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Order receives the next available document number from the configured sequence

steps.name: reserveStockForLines
steps.description: Iterate over each order line and reserve the ordered quantity from stock

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Each line reserves its ordered quantity in the corresponding storage bin

steps.name: calculateTax
steps.description: Calculate tax amounts for the order. TODO(vertical-slice): implement tax calculation

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Grand total is updated with the calculated tax amount

steps.name: postAccounting
steps.description: Post accounting entries for the completed order. TODO(vertical-slice): implement accounting posting

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Accounting entries are created and the order is marked as posted

steps.name: updateStatusComplete
steps.description: Set order status to CO, mark as processed, and clear the document action

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Order status becomes CO, processed=true, documentAction='--'

edgeCases.description: Order has no lines — must reject with clear error
One or more lines have zero or negative quantity
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating invalid line quantities

edgeCases.description: A line exists without a product assigned
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails indicating missing product on line
Entire transaction rolls back — stock reservations are undone, status remains unchanged

steps.name: validateStatusCompleted
steps.description: Verify the order is in Completed status before allowing void

operation.errorMessage: Only completed orders can be voided

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Reject void action if order is not in CO status

steps.name: releaseReservedStock
steps.description: Iterate over each order line and release all previously reserved quantities

behavioral.expectedBehavior: Each line's reserved quantity is released back to available stock

steps.name: reverseAccounting
steps.description: Reverse accounting entries created during completion. TODO(vertical-slice): implement accounting reversal

behavioral.expectedBehavior: All accounting entries from completion are reversed

steps.name: updateStatusVoid
steps.description: Set order status to VO and clear the document action

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void a draft order (status DR)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails with VOID_INVALID_STATUS — only CO orders can be voided

edgeCases.description: Attempt to void an order that is already voided (status VO)
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Validation fails — cannot void an already voided order

edgeCases.description: All reserved quantities must be fully released after void
edgeCases.expectedBehavior: Reserved qty for each line returns to zero, available stock is restored
